title: Avbenagbiku Adjarho - 446945

						Referral to Solicitors Disciplinary Tribunal
					
 

 

 Outcome date:
 26 July 2025
 

 

 Published date:
 19 March 2026
 

 



 


 
Firm details


 

 Firm or organisation at date of publication and at time of matters giving rise to outcome
 

 

 Name:
 Chancery CS Solicitors
 

 

 Address(es):
 246-250 Romford Road, London E7 9HZ


 

 

 Firm ID:
 596961
 


 


 

 
Outcome details

 
This outcome was reached by SRA decision.




 
Reasons/basis



This notification relates to a Decision to prosecute before the Solicitors Disciplinary Tribunal. This is an independent Tribunal which will reach its own decision after considering all the evidence, including any evidence put forward by the Solicitor. The Tribunal has certified that there is a case to answer in respect of allegations which are or include that:

Between January 2022 and November 2024, Mr Adjarho failed to comply with an undertaking, given on behalf of the firm to remove an existing charge on a property, within a reasonable amount of time and, failed to rectify the issues promptly.

On 11 April 2023, Mr Adjarho misled the other party’s legal representatives that he had discharged the existing charge on the property but had not in fact done so.

The allegations are subject to a Hearing before the Solicitors Disciplinary Tribunal and are as yet unproven.
